title: Chronic Subdural Hematoma Treatment With Intra-Arterial Bevacizumab Injection

skipped_criteria: Radiographic evidence of chronic subdural hematoma (persistence >10 days, mixed density blood, subdural membranes): no imaging or temporal fields in schema.
Can obtain informed consent and HIPAA authorization: procedural/consent criterion, not expressible as a patient field.
Breastfeeding or unwilling to practice contraception: no breastfeeding or contraception fields in schema.
Concomitant intracranial pathology other than subdural hematoma (e.g., intracranial malignancy): no field for specific intracranial pathology type.
Known hypersensitivity to bevacizumab: no allergy/hypersensitivity fields in schema.
Radiographic evidence of mass effect: no imaging finding fields in schema.
Focal neurological deficits attributed to subdural hematoma: no neurological deficit fields in schema.
Craniotomy or burr hole procedures performed in preceding two weeks prior to onset of subdural hematoma: no surgical history or temporal fields in schema.
Secondary causes apart from trauma for chronic subdural hematoma (vascular abnormality or tumor): no etiology classification fields in schema.
Emergent surgical evacuation required: no field for surgical urgency in schema.
Non-convexity chronic subdural hematoma: no anatomical location fields in schema.
Coagulation abnormalities (platelet count <100,000 and/or INR <1.5): no lab value fields in schema.
Known contraindications for angiography or contrast allergy: no allergy or procedure contraindication fields in schema.
Known active systemic infection or sepsis: no infection status fields in schema.
Contraindication to anesthetic agents for conscious sedation/MAC: no anesthesia contraindication fields in schema.
Life expectancy less than six months due to comorbid terminal conditions: no prognosis or comorbidity fields in schema.
Premorbid modified Rankin score (mRS) of 5 or greater: no mRS or functional status fields in schema.
Concurrent participation in another research protocol for experimental therapy: no enrollment status fields in schema.
